testcase.name: test_admin_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_near_miss_investigation.py:44: in test_admin_login assert data["employee"]["manager_control"] == "yes" E AssertionError: assert None == 'yes'

testcase.name: test_investigate_near_miss_with_severity_red
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_near_miss_investigation.py:85: in test_investigate_near_miss_with_severity_red near_miss_id = self.test_create_near_miss_for_investigation() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_near_miss_investigation.py:78: in test_create_near_miss_for_investigation assert data["description"].startswith("TEST_INVESTIGATION_") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'description'
